title: Update PWA app icon to fire-and-ice tiger illustration

requirements.text: Generate new PWA app icons (192×192 and 512×512) inspired by the uploaded image: a dramatic split fire-and-ice dual tiger design with a dark background — a glowing blue ice tiger on the left and a blazing red/orange fire tiger on the right, facing outward. The icon should be rendered as a square icon suitable for PWA use.
acceptanceCriteria: Two PNG icon files are generated: icon-192x192.png and icon-512x512.png featuring the fire-and-ice dual tiger design
Icons are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated/ or the existing icon asset path used by the PWA manifest
frontend/public/manifest.json icon entries point to the new icon files
frontend/index.html favicon and apple-touch-icon references are updated to use the new icon

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Do not change the PWA manifest structure — only update icon file references
nonGoals: Changing the app name, theme colors, or any other PWA metadata

required: Square PWA app icon featuring a split dual-tiger composition: glowing neon blue ice tiger on the left half and blazing red-orange fire tiger on the right half, dramatic dark background with intense neon glow lighting (app-icon-512.dim_512x512.png)

Square PWA app icon featuring a split dual-tiger composition: glowing neon blue ice tiger on the left half and blazing red-orange fire tiger on the right half, dramatic dark background with intense neon glow lighting (app-icon-192.dim_192x192.png)
